content: Absolutely mind-bending! Christopher Nolan outdid himself with Inception. The layers of dreams and the music are just perfect.
Breaking Bad is arguably the best series ever made. The character development of Walter White is unparalleled.
The Dark Knight is the best Batman movie. Heath Ledger's Joker is legendary. A bit dark but very engaging.
Stranger Things has a great 80s vibe. The kids are great actors, but some plot points felt a bit repetitive in later seasons.
Pulp Fiction is a cult classic for a reason. Tarantino's dialogue is sharp and the non-linear storytelling is brilliant.
